name: COCOA-SPICE CAKE with CRYSTALLIZED GINGER and COCONUT-CHOCOLATE GANACHE

ingredients.item: ¼ cup coconut oil, melted, plus more for oiling
ingredients.original: ¼ cup coconut oil, melted, plus more for oiling

ingredients.item: 1 cup plus 1 tablespoon fine raw cane sugar
ingredients.original: 1 cup plus 1 tablespoon fine raw cane sugar

ingredients.item: ¾ cup whole wheat pastry flour
ingredients.original: ¾ cup whole wheat pastry flour

ingredients.item: 6 tablespoons unsweetened natural cocoa powder (not Dutch-processed)
ingredients.original: 6 tablespoons unsweetened natural cocoa powder (not Dutch-processed)

ingredients.item: ½ cup plus 2 tablespoons coconut milk
ingredients.original: ½ cup plus 2 tablespoons coconut milk

ingredients.item: ¼ cup packed mashed ripe avocado (about ½ medium avocado)
ingredients.original: ¼ cup packed mashed ripe avocado (about ½ medium avocado)

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons plus 1 teaspoon dark Jamaican rum
ingredients.original: 2 tablespoons plus 1 teaspoon dark Jamaican rum

ingredients.item: 3 ounces crystallized ginger, finely chopped (about ½ cup)
ingredients.original: 3 ounces crystallized ginger, finely chopped (about ½ cup)

ingredients.item: 5 ounces unsweetened baking chocolate, finely chopped
ingredients.original: 5 ounces unsweetened baking chocolate, finely chopped
